test.create_query: CREATE TABLE t_json_perf_a (data JSON(t1 Int64, t2 String, t3 Float64, SKIP dummy, max_dynamic_paths=100)) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()
CREATE TABLE t_json_perf_b (data JSON(t1 Int64, t2 String, t3 Float64, SKIP dummy, max_dynamic_paths=200)) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO t_json_perf_a SELECT mapFromArrays( arrayConcat( ['t1', 't2', 't3'], arrayMap(i -> concat('d', toString(i)), range(100)), arrayMap(i -> concat('s', toString(i)), range(100)) ), arrayConcat( [toString(number), concat('str_', toString(number)), toString(toFloat64(number) * 1.5)], arrayMap(i -> toString(number * 100 + i), range(100)), arrayMap(i -> toString(number * 200 + i), range(100)) ) ) FROM numbers(10000)

INSERT INTO t_json_perf_b SELECT mapFromArrays( arrayConcat( ['t1', 't2', 't3'], arrayMap(i -> concat('d', toString(i)), range(198)) ), arrayConcat( [toString(number), concat('str_', toString(number)), toString(toFloat64(number) * 1.5)], arrayMap(i -> toString(number * 100 + i), range(198)) ) ) FROM numbers(10000)
test.query: SELECT data::JSON(t1 Int64, t2 String, t3 Float64, max_dynamic_paths=100) FROM t_json_perf_a FORMAT Null
SELECT data::JSON(t1 Int64, t2 String, t3 Float64, d0 Int64, max_dynamic_paths=100) FROM t_json_perf_a FORMAT Null
SELECT data::JSON(t1 Int64, t2 String, t3 Float64, s0 Int64, max_dynamic_paths=100) FROM t_json_perf_a FORMAT Null
SELECT data::JSON(t2 String, t3 Float64, max_dynamic_paths=200) FROM t_json_perf_b FORMAT Null
SELECT data::JSON(t2 String, t3 Float64, d0 Int64, max_dynamic_paths=100) FROM t_json_perf_a FORMAT Null
SELECT data::JSON(t2 String, t3 Float64, max_dynamic_paths=100) FROM t_json_perf_a FORMAT Null
SELECT data::JSON(t1 Int32, t2 String, t3 Float64, max_dynamic_paths=100) FROM t_json_perf_a FORMAT Null
SELECT data::JSON(t1 Int64, t2 String, t3 Float64, SKIP d0, max_dynamic_paths=100) FROM t_json_perf_a FORMAT Null
SELECT data::JSON(t1 Int64, t2 String, t3 Float64, SKIP s0, max_dynamic_paths=100) FROM t_json_perf_a FORMAT Null
SELECT data::JSON(t1 Int32, t3 Float64, d0 Int64, SKIP d1, max_dynamic_paths=100) FROM t_json_perf_a FORMAT Null
